business_description.nature_of_business: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy number WC-KCB-2025-5580; effective 08/01/2025; 425 full-time and 45 part-time employees; 13 claims in 2024 policy year

positives: Formal return-to-work and modified duty program in place
Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits
42 years in business with 28 years under current management
Annual revenue of $95,000,000 indicating large, established operation
Four of five locations are fully sprinklered
concerns: No written contracts maintained with all subcontractors
Certificates of insurance not required from all subcontractors prior to work commencement
No hold-harmless agreements obtained from all subcontractors
Hazardous materials used or encountered in operations
40% of work performed by subcontractors with limited contractual controls
Significant upward claims trend: 4 claims (2022) → 10 claims (2023) → 13 claims (2024)
Policy cancellation by Zurich Insurance Group in 2022
LOC-005 (100 Dutilh Road, Cranberry Township, PA 16066) — 28,000 sq ft warehouse, built 2005, not sprinklered
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group): 4 claims, premium $1,369,245.71, policy cancelled; 2023 (Berkshire Hathaway Guard): 10 claims, premium $1,476,849.96, no cancellation; 2024 (Nationwide Insurance): 13 claims, premium $1,634,721.63, no cancellation. Claims frequency has more than tripled over three years with a 19.3% premium increase over the same period.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: General contracting for commercial and institutional construction — healthcare facilities, educational buildings, and corporate offices throughout Western Pennsylvania. Hours of operation: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 3:30 PM. Approximately 40% of work is performed by subcontractors. Three largest projects completed in the past 3 years: 1) $1.2M restaurant build-out, 2) $800K medical office renovation, 3) $650K church addition. Operations include work performed above 4 stories and demolition or blasting activities.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: Formal safety program: Yes. Formal written safety program: Yes. Formal return-to-work or modified duty program: Yes. Maintains OSHA 300 logs and conducts regular job-site safety audits: Yes. Certificates of insurance required from all subcontractors before work begins: No. Written contracts with all subcontractors: No. Hold-harmless agreements from all subcontractors: No.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2022 (Zurich Insurance Group): 4 claims, premium $1,369,245.71, cancellation: Yes. 2023 (Berkshire Hathaway Guard): 10 claims, premium $1,476,849.96, cancellation: No. 2024 (Nationwide Insurance): 13 claims, premium $1,634,721.63, cancellation: No. Claims frequency increased 225% from 2022 to 2024; prior policy with Zurich was cancelled in 2022.
